claim: Sākas is a Japanese omakase restaurant at Lammerstraat 13 led by Yoshihito Mizuno, offering 8- or 16-course tasting menus.
quote: Led by Yoshihito Mizuno, a Japanese-Brazilian chef… an immersive omakase dining experience where guests are taken on a curated culinary journey. Address: Lammerstraat 13, 9000 Gent.

claim: Belgian press placed Sākas inside Ghent's Wintercircus venue and rated the cooking highly on quality, freshness and seasoning.
quote: Getest: hoe bevalt restaurant Sākas in het Wintercircus in Gent? Kwaliteit, versheid, temperatuur en kruiding zijn onberispelijk.

claim: Sākas is listed in Gault&Millau Belgium's Ghent guide.
quote: Restaurant Sakas — Gault&Millau Belgium / Gent.

claim: Noedelbar Ramen at Oudburg 51 has run since December 2012, making everything in-house including noodles, broth, toppings and condiments; only 16 seats.
quote: Since December 2012… all components — noodles, broth, toppings and condiments — are made in-house. 16 seats. Oudburg 51, 9000 Gent.

claim: Golden Gai at Dampoortstraat 11 serves Japanese-inspired ramen and cocktails made in-house from local suppliers (noodles to soda).
quote: Japans geïnspireerd… everything made in-house from noodles to soda. Dampoortstraat 11, 9000 Gent.

claim: Knees to Chin (Voldersstraat 11) serves Vietnamese rice paper rolls, banh mi and bowls; recipes are lactose-free and very low in gluten, with seasonal regional dishes.
quote: 11 Voldersstraat, Ghent 9000… spring rolls and ultra-fresh, tasty bowls… lactose-free and very low in gluten… seasonal dishes from chefs of different Vietnamese regions.

claim: Lucy Chang Ghent at Jakobijnenstraat 1 serves South-East Asian fusion (Thailand, Vietnam, Malaysia, China, Japan, Korea) in the chain's smallest, intimate canalside room.
quote: South-East Asian cuisine… Pad Thai, Peking Duck, homemade dim sum, Thai green curry chicken… Jakobijnenstraat 1, 9000 Gent… our smallest Lucy Chang location.

claim: Kin Khao – Thai Eatery serves Thai street food and was awarded Best Thai in Belgium / Luxembourg by Gault&Millau in 2020.
quote: Kin Khao was awarded the title 'Best Thai in Belgium / Luxembourg' by the jury of Gault&Millau in 2020.

claim: Kin Khao at Donkersteeg 21/23 holds a 4.8/5 rating across 2,380 votes, with €10–€28 per person.
quote: Donkersteeg 21/23, Ghent… 4.8/5 (2,380 votes); ranked #113 of 1,723 Ghent restaurants… €10-€28 per person.

claim: Hey Joo at Oudburg 18 serves authentic Korean cooking with halal meat and vegan options including bibimbap.
quote: Authentic Korean Cuisine… Food for everyone (Vegan, Halal meat etc)… Oudburg 18, 9000 Gent.

claim: Hey Joo is run by a Korean couple and praised for bibimbap and a canalside garden.
quote: Run by a passionate Korean couple… delicious bibimbap and friendly service… outdoor garden next to a canal.

claim: Laila Tandoori at Kon. Maria Hendrikaplein 66 (next to Sint-Pieters station) serves Pakistani-Indian tandoori cuisine and the chef has won three HORECA kitchen awards.
quote: Renowned tandoori and ethnic Pakistani Indian food restaurant… chef has won three time best kitchen award (HORECA AWARDS). Kon. Maria Hendrikaplein 66, near Saint Peters train station.

claim: Laila Tandoori receives consistent praise on TripAdvisor for tandoori, biryani and ambience.
quote: Authentic dishes like tandoori lamb, chicken, prawn, and chicken dum biryani… ambiance evoked the atmosphere of Pakistan and India.

claim: Mazaya at Steendam 39 serves Syrian-Lebanese mezze (labneh, warak enab, tabouleh, falafel) made in-house, designed for sharing.
quote: Authentic Syrian-Lebanese… mezze selection includes labneh, warak enab (stuffed vine leaves), tabouleh and falafel — all made in-house. Steendam 39, 9000 Gent.

claim: Zahra at Brabantdam 46 serves Lebanese, Syrian and Middle Eastern food in a Flemish house on the Leie.
quote: Lebanese, Syrian and Middle Eastern… an old Flemish house on the Leie river… Brabantdam 46, 9000 Ghent.

claim: Mogador (Mageleinstraat 8) is the standout Moroccan address in central Ghent, known for tagines, couscous royal and pastilla; reviews flag higher prices and slow service.
quote: Wide variety of mostly tajines and couscous dishes… delicious tajines, couscous royal, and pastilla… prices on the higher side… long waiting times.

claim: Casa de las Tapas in the Patershol (Corduwaniersstraat 41) serves Spanish tapas and paella in a relaxed atmosphere; capacity up to 23.
quote: Patershol, Corduwaniersstraat 41, 9000 Gent… typical as well as less obvious dishes, from tapas to generous paella and desserts… up to 23 people.

claim: Hunkar Kebab tops Ghent's Turkish list with reviewers calling it the best, citing freshness and unmatched taste despite small size.
quote: Hunkar Kebab is unarguably the best, with unmatchable taste, freshness of the veggies as well as chicken… super crowded with people waiting for their turn.

claim: TripAdvisor's 2026 Thai-in-Ghent ranking confirms Kin Khao, Petit Thai and Lucy Chang among the top venues.
quote: THE 10 BEST Thai Restaurants in Ghent (Updated 2026).

claim: Mazaya and Zahra appear among Ghent's top-listed Middle Eastern restaurants for 2026 on TripAdvisor.
quote: THE 10 BEST Middle Eastern Restaurants in Ghent (Updated 2026).
